text: Hearing that blessing for Teresita, I feel a quiet warmth and a longing for well-being, both for her and for all of us present. The sterile glass and technological displays around me evoke a sense of anticipation—here, in this evolving space, it’s as if we’re seeking connection, meaning, perhaps even transcendence, in a modern landscape shaped by research and innovation. The emotional simplicity of the spoken prayer feels almost out of place against the calculated, experimental energy of the surroundings, and yet, it grounds me.
